name: MetaMask Connector
job_to_be_done: Check Ethereum wallet balances, chain ID, and transaction receipts via MetaMask-connected accounts, with strict EIP-55 address validation.
description: Read-only Ethereum JSON-RPC lookups. Checks wallet balances, chain ID, and transaction receipts. No funds are custodied, no transactions are signed, no value is transmitted.
short_description: Read-only Ethereum JSON-RPC lookups (chain id, balance, transaction receipt).
example_prompts: What chain is my wallet connected to?
Look up the receipt for tx 0x...
